title: Register now: Payday Super webinar
description: Join us to hear the latest on Payday Super and what you may need to do to be ready for 1 July 2026.
keywords: Register, Payday, Super, SMSF, self-managed, funds, webinar, SuperStream, key, changes, video

content_blocks.text: Register here External Link for our Payday Super webinar on Monday 16 February at 2 pm AEDT.
Media: Payday Super webinar for super funds https://share.viostream.com/bi9or7ora9wsi8 External Link ( Duration: 00:18)

We’ll cover the key changes for super funds, including self-managed super funds (SMSFs) need to make for Payday Super, the updates to SuperStream, and practical steps funds can take to support trustees in making the transition to Payday Super as smooth as possible.
All SMSFs that receive super guarantee contributions from employers, are expected to be ready to comply with the updated requirements from 1 July 2026.
Updated SuperStream and Fund Validation Service documentation is available on the ATO software developers website External Link .
Our webinar will cover the key changes and provide an opportunity for you to ask questions.
For more information, go to ato.gov.au/paydaysuper
Looking for the latest news for SMSFs? You can stay up to date by visiting our SMSF newsroom and subscribing External Link to our monthly SMSF newsletter.
